## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing functionality changes behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / chore (no functional change)

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `node --test` passes locally
- [ ] No new npm dependencies added
- [ ] Conventional commit style (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, `test:`)
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] Updated README.md if commands or install flow changed
